The stethoscope embodies my current voice, a tool that listens attentively to the whispers of the heart, echoing the pulse of knowledge within the walls of a hospital.


The echo of the stethoscope resonates in the sterile yet vibrant corridors of a medical facility, where the rhythm of life syncs with the hum of machinery and the gentle murmur of nurses tending to their patients.
